title: GPO Swords
description: A place in Roblox on the theme of the anime "One Piece" created by the team Grand Quest Games (Phoeating, etc.). Sword models are only already remade in Minecraft itself
body:
I transferred swords from the game **Grand Piece Online** to **Minecraft**! 
> This is my first experience in creating models, I hope you like my (project). Each time I will add more and more swords from there, I hope for your support <3

Texture pack requires **Optifine** or **CIT RESEWN mod** to work
# Version 1.0
Currently existing swords
- Iceborn Rapier
- Iceborn Blade
- Black Pitchfork

**P.s** 

 _Rename Diamond/Netherite Sword_
